svg_code:
<svg viewBox="0 0 640 200" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <defs>
    <style>
      .d03-bg { fill: #1A1A2E; }
      
      .d03-balloon-primary { animation: d03-float 4s ease-in-out infinite; }
      .d03-balloon-secondary { animation: d03-sway 5s ease-in-out infinite; }
      .d03-balloon-accent { animation: d03-pulse 3.5s ease-in-out infinite; }
      
      @keyframes d03-float {
        0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0px); }
        50% { transform: translateY(-15px); }
      }
      
      @keyframes d03-sway {
        0%, 100% { transform: translateX(0px) translateY(0px); }
        25% { transform: translateX(-8px) translateY(-10px); }
        75% { transform: translateX(8px) translateY(-12px); }
      }
      
      @keyframes d03-pulse {
        0%, 100% { r: 22px; opacity: 0.95; }
        50% { r: 24px; opacity: 1; }
      }
      
      .d03-string { stroke: #2A2A4E; stroke-width: 1; }
      .d03-shine { opacity: 0.35; }
      .d03-note { animation: d03-flutter 2s ease-in-out infinite; }
      
      @keyframes d03-flutter {
        0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0px) rotateZ(0deg); }
        50% { transform: translateY(-8px) rotateZ(5deg); }
      }
    </style>
    
    <radialGradient id="d03-gradient-red" cx="30%" cy="30%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#FF6B7A;stop-opacity:1" />
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#E63946;stop-opacity:1" />
    </radialGradient>
    
    <radialGradient id="d03-gradient-blue" cx="30%" cy="30%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#5BA3C3;stop-opacity:1" />
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#457B9D;stop-opacity:1" />
    </radialGradient>
    
    <radialGradient id="d03-gradient-gold" cx="30%" cy="30%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#FFB870;stop-opacity:1" />
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#F4A261;stop-opacity:1" />
    </radialGradient>
    
    <radialGradient id="d03-gradient-teal" cx="30%" cy="30%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#4DB8A3;stop-opacity:1" />
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#2A9D8F;stop-opacity:1" />
    </radialGradient>
    
    <radialGradient id="d03-gradient-purple" cx="30%" cy="30%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#B376FF;stop-opacity:1" />
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#9B5DE5;stop-opacity:1" />
    </radialGradient>
    
    <radialGradient id="d03-gradient-orange" cx="30%" cy="30%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#FF9E3A;stop-opacity:1" />
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#F77F00;stop-opacity:1" />
    </radialGradient>
  </defs>
  
  <!-- Background -->
  <rect class="d03-bg" width="640" height="200"/>
  
  <!-- Saxophone Balloon (Red) -->
  <g style="animation-delay: 0s;" class="d03-balloon-primary">
    <circle cx="80" cy="80" r="24" fill="url(#d03-gradient-red)"/>
    <line x1="80" y1="104" x2="80" y2="130" class="d03-string"/>
    <ellipse cx="76" cy="75" rx="8" ry="10" fill="white" class="d03-shine"/>
  </g>
  
  <!-- Trumpet Balloon (Gold) -->
  <g style="animation-delay: 0.5s;" class="d03-balloon-secondary">
    <circle cx="160" cy="60" r="26" fill="url(#d03-gradient-gold)"/>
    <line x1="160" y1="86" x2="160" y2="115" class="d03-string"/>
    <ellipse cx="155" cy="54" rx="9" ry="11" fill="white" class="d03-shine"/>
  </g>
  
  <!-- Piano Keys Balloon (Blue) -->
  <g style="animation-delay: 1s;" class="d03-balloon-accent">
    <circle cx="280" cy="90" r="22" fill="url(#d03-gradient-blue)"/>
    <line x1="280" y1="112" x2="280" y2="140" class="d03-string"/>
    <ellipse cx="276" cy="85" rx="7" ry="9" fill="white" class="d03-shine"/>
  </g>
  
  <!-- Musical Note Balloon (Teal) -->
  <g style="animation-delay: 1.3s;" class="d03-balloon-primary">
    <circle cx="360" cy="75" r="20" fill="url(#d03-gradient-teal)"/>
    <line x1="360" y1="95" x2="360" y2="120" class="d03-string"/>
    <ellipse cx="357" cy="70" rx="6" ry="8" fill="white" class="d03-shine"/>
  </g>
  
  <!-- Rhythm/Beat Balloon (Purple) -->
  <g style="animation-delay: 1.8s;" class="d03-balloon-secondary">
    <circle cx="480" cy="85" r="23" fill="url(#d03-gradient-purple)"/>
    <line x1="480" y1="108" x2="480" y2="135" class="d03-string"/>
    <ellipse cx="476" cy="80" rx="7.5" ry="10" fill="white" class="d03-shine"/>
  </g>
  
  <!-- Jazz Ensemble Balloon (Orange) -->
  <g style="animation-delay: 2s;" class="d03-balloon-accent">
    <circle cx="560" cy="70" r="25" fill="url(#d03-gradient-orange)"/>
    <line x1="560" y1="95" x2="560" y2="125" class="d03-string"/>
    <ellipse cx="555" cy="64" rx="8.5" ry="11" fill="white" class="d03-shine"/>
  </g>
  
  <!-- Floating Musical Notes -->
  <g class="d03-note" style="animation-delay: 0.3s;">
    <text x="120" y="130" font-size="18" fill="#F4A261" opacity="0.6">♪</text>
  </g>
  
  <g class="d03-note" style="animation-delay: 0.8s;">
    <text x="320" y="145" font-size="20" fill="#E63946" opacity="0.5">♫</text>
  </g>
  
  <g class="d03-note" style="animation-delay: 1.5s;">
    <text x="520" y="140" font-size="16" fill="#9B5DE5" opacity="0.6">♪</text>
  </g>
  
  <g class="d03-note" style="animation-delay: 2.2s;">
    <text x="200" y="155" font-size="17" fill="#2A9D8F" opacity="0.5">♫</text>
  </g>
  
  <!-- Celebration Sparkles -->
  <g opacity="0.7">
    <circle cx="100" cy="40" r="2" fill="#FFD700" style="animation: d03-twinkle 1.5s ease-in-out infinite; animation-delay: 0s;"/>
    <circle cx="250" cy="35" r="1.5" fill="#FFD700" style="animation: d03-twinkle 1.5s ease-in-out infinite; animation-delay: 0.4s;"/>
    <circle cx="420" cy="45" r="2" fill="#FFD700" style="animation: d03-twinkle 1.5s ease-in-out infinite; animation-delay: 0.8s;"/>
    <circle cx="580" cy="38" r="1.5" fill="#FFD700" style="animation: d03-twinkle 1.5s ease-in-out infinite; animation-delay: 1.2s;"/>
  </g>
  
  <style>
    @keyframes d03-twinkle {
      0%, 100% { opacity: 0.3; }
      50% { opacity: 1; }
    }
  </style>
</svg>
description: Jazz instruments morph into buoyant balloons that sway and pulse upward, while floating musical notes and twinkling stars celebrate the transformation into pure joy.
